Function [CC]: FUNCTION: O-methyltransferase required for two non-consecutive steps during ubiquinone biosynthesis. Catalyzes the 2 O-methylation of 3,4-dihydroxy-5-(all-trans-polyprenyl)benzoic acid into 4-hydroxy-3-methoxy-5-(all-trans-polyprenyl)benzoic acid. Also catalyzes the last step of ubiquinone biosynthesis by mediating methylation of 3-demethylubiquinone into ubiquinone. Also able to mediate the methylation of 3-demethylubiquinol into ubiquinol. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_03190}.
